title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Verify that a mobile user can accept one Lens tenant invite and decline another, with the accepted tenant info persisting after declining the second invite.
steps: Cloud Admin sends two different Lens account invites to the mobile user's email.
User launches the app, navigates to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account, and logs in.
User observes two new invites appear.
User logs out and observes invites disappear.
User logs back in and observes invites reappear.
User taps Accept on one invite — accepted invite disappears, second remains.
User navigates to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App and verifies tenant info matches the accepted invite.
User goes back to General > Account and taps Decline on the remaining invite — it disappears.
User navigates to Support > App again and verifies tenant info is unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
expected: User can accept one invite and decline the other. After accepting, tenant info in Support > App matches the accepted invite. After declining the remaining invite, tenant info remains unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
